enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Andangkaka?

The song Andangkaka is a lively and energetic track that celebrates joy and festivity, often associated with dance and celebration.

What is the context of this song in the movie Anniyan?

In Anniyan, the song is part of a vibrant sequence that showcases the protagonist's exuberance and zest for life.

Who are the singers of Andangkaka?

The song features a unique collaboration of talented singers including Jassie Gift, KK, Saindhavi, and Shreya Ghoshal.

When was the song released?

Andangkaka was released on June 17, 2005, as part of the movie Anniyan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Andangkaka from the movie Anniyan is a lively and upbeat track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. It features a dynamic collaboration of talented singers, creating an infectious energy that resonates with listeners. The lyrics convey a sense of happiness and exuberance, making it perfect for festive occasions. This song evokes feelings of joy and encourages listeners to embrace the moment and celebrate life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Andangkaka from Anniyan is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring a unique collaboration of voices from Jassie Gift, KK, Saindhavi, and Shreya Ghoshal. This dance number is sure to get you on your feet with its infectious rhythm and catchy lyrics. Experience the magic of this song that perfectly captures the essence of joy and festivity!
stanzaMeanings: The dark cloud is coming, rumbling and rumbling.
The white moon is shining, rumbling and rumbling.
I-R is a big wave, rumbling and rumbling.
A thousand fish are swimming, rumbling and making noise.
When a flower blooms, it shows its beauty.
Love is like a green leaf, shining in the dark, with a beautiful gaze.
Hey, come together, touch your beloved, and make everything pure.
The dark cloud is coming...
What will happen if I say 'come here'? Will you respond? If I call out, will you answer? Look at this, I will go away, and the fire will spread in the air.
I am dancing joyfully, rumbling and rumbling.
Dad, I have a strong body, rumbling and rumbling.
I thought you were like a leaf, but I got stuck in your mouth.
The dark cloud is coming...
Mother, are you the one who eats the banana flower?
Will you sing without any teeth?
Will you eat the old banana?
The spicy food is ready, and you have an interval.
Like milk, your body is flowing, and in it, just a little light is shining.
The dark cloud is coming, rumbling and rumbling.
The white moon is shining, rumbling and rumbling.
I-R is a big wave, rumbling and rumbling.
A thousand fish are swimming, rumbling and making noise.
When a flower blooms, it shows its beauty.
Love is like a green leaf, shining in the dark, with a beautiful gaze.
